description_long: This is an ornate, high-backed wooden chair with intricate carvings on the crest rail and backrest frame, reminiscent of Victorian or Gothic Revival styles. The chair features a tall, oval-shaped padded backrest upholstered in dark leather or faux leather, bordered by detailed woodwork. The seat is also padded and covered in matching dark material, providing comfort and a cohesive look. Four turned wooden legs support the chair, with the front legs being more elaborately carved and the rear legs simpler. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its vertical, throne-like silhouette. Its dark finish and decorative details suggest it is designed for formal or ceremonial settings, such as a city hall, historic building, or upscale urban interior.
description: A tall, ornately carved wooden chair with a high, padded backrest and seat, upholstered in dark material, and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the elaborate crest rail, turned front legs, and the full height of the padded backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's depth, the thickness of the padded seat, and the vertical alignment of the backrest.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the symmetrical carvings, oval backrest, and the full width of the seat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the backrest and seat, with visible turned leg details.
